dcdc_turnon.title: DC-DC Turn On Time
dcdc_turnon.short: Time when the high-voltage DC-DC converter turns on after the previous acquisition.
dcdc_turnon.recommended: Usually keep below 19500 µs; tune mainly for energy.

meas_period.title: Acquisition Period
meas_period.details: Higher frame rates can be less stable because of BLE bandwidth.

sampling_freq.title: Sampling Frequency
sampling_freq.short: ADC sampling frequency during ultrasound acquisition.
sampling_freq.recommended: 8 MHz is the recommended default for WULPUS.
sampling_freq.details: Together with number of samples, it sets depth resolution and range.

num_samples.title: Number of Samples
num_samples.short: Number of ADC samples acquired per ultrasound frame.
num_samples.details: Approximate depth depends on sound speed c, sample count N, and sampling frequency fs.
num_samples.notes: With c ~= 1540 m/s, N = 400, fs = 8 MHz: depth ~= 38.5 mm.

rx_gain.title: Receive (RX) Gain
rx_gain.short: PGA gain in the receive path.
rx_gain.details: Higher gain increases sensitivity but also noise and saturation risk.

pulse_freq.title: Pulse Frequency
pulse_freq.recommended: Typically set near transducer center frequency; often 1.5-2.5 MHz.
pulse_freq.details: Best performance is usually near transducer resonance.

imu_active.title: IMU Active
imu_active.short: Enable or disable IMU data per acquisition frame.
imu_active.recommended: Set true only if IMU is needed; otherwise false.
imu_active.details: Preset uses imu_active true/false. Internally: true -> mode 101, false -> mode 0. With IMU off, all 400 samples are ultrasound.

num_pulses.title: Number of Pulses
num_pulses.short: Number of excitation pulses emitted per acquisition.
num_pulses.recommended: Use the minimum that yields robust SNR for your probe.
num_pulses.details: More pulses can improve energy but also affect timing and power.

start_hvmuxrx.title: HV-MUX RX Start Time
start_hvmuxrx.short: Time when the high-voltage multiplexer switches from TX to RX path.
start_hvmuxrx.details: Controlled by SMCLK. Alignment vs HSPLL is imperfect and device-dependent.
start_hvmuxrx.notes: Treat as an empirical tuning parameter per probe and setup.

start_ppg.title: PPG Start Time
start_ppg.short: Time when ultrasound pulses are generated.
start_ppg.details: Controlled by HSPLL and used as transmit timing reference.

turnon_adc.title: ADC Turn On Time
turnon_adc.short: Time when ADC power-up starts (sampling has not started yet).
turnon_adc.recommended: Keep at 5 µs unless specifically required.

start_pgainbias.title: PGA Bias Start Time
start_pgainbias.short: Time when internal PGA bias is enabled.
start_pgainbias.recommended: Keep at 5 µs unless specifically required.

start_adcsampl.title: ADC Sampling Start Time
start_adcsampl.short: Time when ADC begins sampling reflected ultrasound signal.
start_adcsampl.details: Delaying this value shifts the acquisition window deeper in tissue.
start_adcsampl.notes: If equal to PPG start, initial samples are often unusable due to TX/RX switching latency.

restart_capt.title: Capture Restart Time
restart_capt.short: Currently not used in the active firmware path.

capt_timeout.title: Capture Timeout Time
capt_timeout.short: Currently not used in the active firmware path.

tx_rx_configs.title: TX/RX Configurations
tx_rx_configs.short: Defines active transmit and receive channel combinations.
tx_rx_configs.details: Each row is one acquisition configuration; firmware cycles them round-robin.
tx_rx_configs.notes: Optimized switching can reduce artifacts depending on channel overlap.
